subject: Acme — next steps
body:
Hi D. —

Following up on our last Proposal. Would love to discuss expanding the deal and circle back on the Pipeline shortly.

Let me know when you have time — I can pull the Customer list for the team review.
notes: Skeleton — trips blacklist (Proposal, Deal, Pipeline, Customer, would love to discuss, expanding the deal, circle back) + missing all three headers + no methodology tag per tech-design §2.8.
